title: CLAUDE.md
text: file provides guidance Claude Code (claude.ai/code) working code repository.

title: CLAUDE.md
text: medinfoR R client library medinfo API — pharmaceutical information API built Clinical Pharmacy Saarland University. queries drug information, interactions, adverse drug reactions (ADRs), formulations, pharmaceutical data Go-based backend. API backend repo: https://github.com/Clinical-Pharmacy-Saarland-University/abdataapi-go

title: CLAUDE.md
code: # Run all tests devtools::test()  # Run a single test file devtools::test(filter = "interaction")  # Run integration tests (requires env vars) # Sys.setenv(MEDINFO_HOST="...", MEDINFO_USER="...", MEDINFO_PASSWORD="...") devtools::test(filter = "integration")  # Regenerate documentation (run after editing roxygen2 comments) roxygen2::roxygenise()  # Check the package devtools::check()  # Build pkgdown site pkgdown::build_site()

title: CLAUDE.md
text: User sets password via api_user_init_password() (uses init token email) api_login() returns ApiCredentials R6 object (defined R/login.R) ApiCredentials object passed credentials argument every API function .request() R/helper.R calls credentials$refresh(force = FALSE) request, automatically refreshing access token expired

title: CLAUDE.md
text: API calls flow .request() → .fetch_body_data(): - .get() / .post() → .request() → .fetch_body_data() → returns data field JSON response - Errors (HTTP 4xx/5xx) handled .throw_error_body(), calls .trow_api_error() (note: typo name intentional, don’t fix without updating references) - response envelope always { "data": ... }; .fetch_body_data() plucks data automatically

title: CLAUDE.md
text: public functions follow api_<noun>_<optional_qualifier>(): - api_interaction_pzn() / api_interaction_compound() — single query - api_interaction_pzn_batch() / api_interaction_compound_batch() — batch queries (multiple PZNs/compounds ) - PZN = Pharmazentralnummer (German pharmaceutical product ID)

title: CLAUDE.md
text: Use checkmate::assert_*() start every exported function API calls.

title: CLAUDE.md
text: Create add relevant R/<topic>.R file Add roxygen2 documentation @export, @param, @return, @examples Run roxygen2::roxygenise() update NAMESPACE man/ function signature : api_<name> <- function(..., credentials)

what: R Client for the medinfo Pharmaceutical Information API
title: R Client for the medinfo Pharmaceutical Information API
text: R client medinfo API — pharmaceutical information service built Clinical Pharmacy Saarland University. provides drug interaction checks, adverse drug reactions (ADRs), pharmacogenetic guidelines, PRISCUS classifications, QT prolongation risk, product information, .

title: R Client for the medinfo Pharmaceutical Information API
text: devtools:

title: R Client for the medinfo Pharmaceutical Information API
text: New accounts receive initial token email. Use set password:
code: library(medinfoR)  api_user_init_password(   host     = "https://medinfo.precisiondosing.de/api/v1",   user     = "your@email.com",   token    = "token-from-email",   password = "your-new-password" )

title: R Client for the medinfo Pharmaceutical Information API
text: api_login() returns ApiCredentials object passed every API function. handles token refresh automatically.

title: R Client for the medinfo Pharmaceutical Information API
code: # Single query by PZN (Pharmazentralnummer) api_interaction_pzn(creds, pzns = c("02208615", "00558736"))  # Single query by compound name api_interaction_compound(creds, compounds = c("Warfarin", "Aspirin"))  # Batch queries (multiple independent sets at once) api_interaction_pzn_batch(creds, pzn_batches = list(   list(pzns = c("02208615", "00558736"), id = 1, details = FALSE),   list(pzns = c("01234567"), id = 2, details = TRUE) ))  api_interaction_compound_batch(creds, compound_batches = list(   list(compounds = c("Warfarin", "Aspirin"), id = 1, details = FALSE, doses = TRUE) ))

title: R Client for the medinfo Pharmaceutical Information API
R Client for the medinfo Pharmaceutical Information API
code: api_compound_guideline(creds, compounds = c("Warfarin", "Clopidogrel")) # Returns a list; each element has $input and $guidelines (data frame)

title: R Client for the medinfo Pharmaceutical Information API
code: api_compound_name(creds, compounds = c("Aspirin", "Paracetamol")) # Returns a list; each element has $input and $matches (data frame with name/type)

title: R Client for the medinfo Pharmaceutical Information API
code: # Active compounds for PZNs api_product_compounds_pzn(creds, pzns = c("02208615"))  # Product info (combination status, category) api_product_info_pzn(creds, pzns = c("02208615", "00558736"))  # Available formulation codes api_formulations(creds)

title: R Client for the medinfo Pharmaceutical Information API
code: # PRISCUS list (potentially inappropriate medications for elderly patients) api_priscus_pzn(creds, pzns = c("02208615", "00558736"))  # QT prolongation risk api_qt_pzn(creds, pzns = c("02208615", "00558736"))

title: R Client for the medinfo Pharmaceutical Information API
code: api_ping(creds)   # health check api_info(creds)   # API version and query limits

title: R Client for the medinfo Pharmaceutical Information API
code: # Get your profile api_user_profile(creds)  # Update profile (at least one field required) api_user_update_profile(creds, first_name = "Jane", organization = "Uni Saarland")

title: R Client for the medinfo Pharmaceutical Information API
code: # Change password (requires current password) api_user_change_password(creds, old_password = "old", new_password = "new")  # Request a password reset token by email (no login required) api_user_request_password_reset(   host  = "https://medinfo.precisiondosing.de/api/v1",   email = "your@email.com" )  # Confirm the reset with the token from the email api_user_confirm_password_reset(   host     = "https://medinfo.precisiondosing.de/api/v1",   email    = "your@email.com",   token    = "token-from-email",   password = "new-password" )

title: R Client for the medinfo Pharmaceutical Information API
code: # Request an email change (sends confirmation token to new address) api_user_request_email_change(creds, email = "new@email.com")  # Confirm the change with the token api_user_confirm_email_change(creds, token = "token-from-email")

title: R Client for the medinfo Pharmaceutical Information API
R Client for the medinfo Pharmaceutical Information API
code: # List all users (admin role required) api_get_users(creds)  # Create a regular user (admin role required) api_create_user(creds, mail = "new@email.com", first_name = "Jane",                 last_name = "Doe", org = "Uni Saarland")  # Create a service user with a fixed password (admin role required) api_create_service_user(creds, mail = "svc@email.com", first_name = "Service",                         last_name = "Account", org = "Uni Saarland",                         password = "service-password")

title: R Client for the medinfo Pharmaceutical Information API
text: Full function documentation available https://clinical-pharmacy-saarland-university.github.io/medinfoR/.

title: R Client for the medinfo Pharmaceutical Information API
text: Unit tests use mocked HTTP calls require credentials: Integration tests call live API. skipped automatically unless required environment variables set. Create .env file package root: run:
code: devtools::test() # .env  (gitignored — never commit this file) MEDINFO_HOST=https://medinfo.precisiondosing.de/api/v1 MEDINFO_USER=your@email.com MEDINFO_PASSWORD=your-password  # Set to "true" to also run admin-only integration tests MEDINFO_ADMIN=false devtools::test()                          # all tests including integration devtools::test(filter = "integration")    # integration tests only

title: R Client for the medinfo Pharmaceutical Information API
code: roxygen2::roxygenise()   # regenerate documentation after editing roxygen2 comments devtools::check()        # full R CMD check pkgdown::build_site()    # build the pkgdown reference site

title: ApiCredentials: API Authentication Credentials — ApiCredentials
text: R6 class manages API authentication credentials, including token storage, expiration checks, token refreshing.

title: ApiCredentials: API Authentication Credentials — ApiCredentials
text: access_token Access token API authentication. refresh_token Refresh token obtaining new access token. token_type Type token, usually "Bearer". access_expires_in Timestamp access token expires. refresh_expires_in Timestamp refresh token expires. role User role assigned API (e.g., "admin"). last_login Timestamp last successful login. host API base URL. Initialize API credentials.

title: ApiCredentials: API Authentication Credentials — ApiCredentials
text: ApiCredentials$new() ApiCredentials$access_token_valid() ApiCredentials$refresh_token_valid() ApiCredentials$refresh() ApiCredentials$print() ApiCredentials$clone()

title: ApiCredentials: API Authentication Credentials — ApiCredentials
code: ApiCredentials$new(   access_token,   refresh_token,   token_type,   access_expires_in,   refresh_expires_in,   role,   last_login,   host )

title: ApiCredentials: API Authentication Credentials — ApiCredentials
text: access_token Access token string. refresh_token Refresh token string. token_type Token type (default: "Bearer"). access_expires_in Expiration timestamp access token. refresh_expires_in Expiration timestamp refresh token. role User role (e.g., "admin"). last_login Timestamp last login. host API base URL.

title: ApiCredentials: API Authentication Credentials — ApiCredentials
text: new ApiCredentials object. Check access token still valid.

title: ApiCredentials: API Authentication Credentials — ApiCredentials
text: TRUE access token valid, FALSE otherwise. Check refresh token still valid.

title: ApiCredentials: API Authentication Credentials — ApiCredentials
text: TRUE refresh token valid, FALSE otherwise. Refresh API tokens. method updates access token refresh token using refresh token.

title: ApiCredentials: API Authentication Credentials — ApiCredentials
text: force Force refresh even access token still valid.

title: ApiCredentials: API Authentication Credentials — ApiCredentials
text: None (updates object fields). Print API credentials (without exposing tokens).

title: ApiCredentials: API Authentication Credentials — ApiCredentials
text: None (prints object summary).

title: ApiCredentials: API Authentication Credentials — ApiCredentials
text: objects class cloneable method.

title: ApiCredentials: API Authentication Credentials — ApiCredentials
text: deep Whether make deep clone.

title: ApiCredentials: API Authentication Credentials — ApiCredentials
code: # Create an instance with API credentials creds <- ApiCredentials$new(   access_token = "your_access_token",   refresh_token = "your_refresh_token",   token_type = "Bearer",   access_expires_in = "2025-02-26T11:16:04.020256331Z",   refresh_expires_in = "2025-02-27T11:01:04.020409021Z",   role = "admin",   last_login = "2025-02-26T11:00:30Z",   host = "https://medinfo.precisiondosing.de/api/v1" )  # Check token validity creds$access_token_valid() #> [1] FALSE  # Refresh tokens if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ creds$refresh(   "new_access_token", "new_refresh_token",   "2025-03-01T12:00:00Z", "2025-03-02T12:00:00Z" ) } # }
